title: centaurea boissieri subsp. atlantica
intro: Centaurea boissieri subsp. atlantica, a lesser-known subspecies of the Centaurea boissieri plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea boissieri subsp. atlantica include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the management of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate symptoms associated with colds, coughs, and fever.
